Energistic Conversion Matrix *.Notes: exchange power for 1 speed; frigates 1power, light cruisers 2 power, transports and cruisers 3 power

Gyro-stabilisation Matrix *.Notes: removes any penalty from manoeuvrability of the ship when making manoeuvres

Ancient Life Sustainer.Notes: gives 5 morale, when losing crew from non combat sources roll 1d10, the loss is ignored on a 5+

Bridge of Antiquity.Notes: Eyes everywhere (+10 command and social on bridge), Hololithic Display Tanks (+5 maneuverability)

Bridge of Antiquity(Cruiser).Notes: Eyes everywhere (+10 command and social on bridge), Hololithic Display Tanks (+5 maneuverability)

Auto-Stabilised Logis-targeter.Notes: External, Image of the Void (+5 Detect), Targeting Matrix (+5 BS)

Teleportarium.Notes: Surprise Strike (and other benefits of teleporting)

Emergency Energy Reserves *.Notes: May have either weapons or other systems unaffected by lack of crew penalties

Emergency Energy Reserves *(Cruiser).Notes: May have either weapons or other systems unaffected by lack of crew penalties

Graviton Flare.Notes: Can blind all vessels in a star system and impose a -30 to their detection for 2 strategic turns. 24h cooldown

Suspension Chambers.Notes: can store half of population in slumber, when enacted lose 1 morale. can awake population later but morale doesnt recover. While asleep poulation doe snot cosume supplies

Suspension Chambers(Cruiser).Notes: can store half of population in slumber, when enacted lose 1 morale. can awake population later but morale doesnt recover. While asleep poulation doe snot cosume supplies

Witch Augur *.Notes: allows the navigator to make awareness tests to detect incoming vessels transitioning out of the immaterium

Cypra Pattern Class 1 Drive.Notes: Dampen Drives  (+15 Silent running & -15 to detect vessel)

Cypra Pattern Class 2 Drive.Notes: Dampen Drives  (+15 Silent running & -15 to detect vessel)

Warp Antenna.Notes: navigator gets +20 to locate astronomican; vessel is easier to locate in the warp -10 to warp encounter rolls.

Warp Sextant.Notes: navigator gets +20 to all perception based tests and Navigate(warp) tests while steering the vessel through the warp.

Gravitational Chute.Notes: Allows the ship to deploy cargo, vehicles and superheavy vehicles from orbit directly onto a planet's surface. The precision of the delivery is based on a scrutiny test modified by the ship's sensors.

Titanicus Pattern Holding Bays.Appropriate Hull Types: Transports, Light Cruisers, Cruisers, Grand Cruisers
Titanicus Pattern Holding Bays.Notes: This takes the place of a port or starboard weapon, or a main cargo hold. Allows the storing and maintenance of super heavy vehicles. Unbalanced, Repairs on vehicles aboard the vessel are not penalized in time. The cost of those repairs is increased by 20%. The Ship counts as having full maintenance bays. Can repair up to 4 super heavy vehicles at a time.

Ethereum Double Layer Field.Notes: Gellar Field which grants the vessel a +20 to all warp encounter rolls

Nano machine swarm.Notes: The swarm can be directed against nearby void vessels or structures to strip them bare, either damaging an enemy voidship or speeding up the salvage of wrecked vessels. May also be used to harvest from asteroids.

Spine Grav Rails.Notes: A system of rails runs down the spine of the vessel. This speeds up the loading and unloading of cargo and materiel. Reduce the time taken for loading/unloading or installing new components by 1 game turn, to a minimum of 1.

Voidcore Warp Engine.Notes: A warp engine from the Dark Age of Technology, the manner in which it functions how how it was made is an inscrutable mystery. This warp engine does not consume warp fuel to travel and halves the required DoS to complete a warp journey.

Matter Extractor and synthisizer.Notes: A device of arcane technology, it allows a vessel to harvest matter from black holes. A ship with this component can harvest 15 cargo space of any type of mineral resource of their choice per game turn from a black hole.

Subspace Communications Array.Notes: An ancient communications engine which allows the use of vox techonology over inimaginable distances. THis component allows the vessel to use vox communication at instant speed over distances equal to 10 lightyears

Memetic Hyperreality Booths.Notes: These devices can be used to teach individuals complex and technical information at an incredible rate. The process tends to rattle the mind of users, but the gain in productivity is often worth the cost. This component grants a 50% discount when learning skills. The user gains an amount of insanity points equal to two times the rank of the skill purchased this way. Each of these components comes with a group of 5 skills it can teach.

Stasis Storage vaults.Notes: These Archaic storage vaults have integrated stasis fields keeping everything they contain in suspended and timeless preservation. These storage vaults grant 30 cargo capacity and 2 trade capacity. Everything stored within cannot expire or move as long as the stasis fields remain functional.

Precision Bombardment Cogitator Array.Notes:
Allows to use macro cannons in close void to surface battlefield support. Once per combat you may use the following ability: Orbital Bombardment
Select a point on the battlefield, three 10m templates are placed on the point, the templates each scatter 2d10 meters in a random direction. All units under a template suffer a 5d10+20 pen 10 hit.

Modular Structure.Notes: The Ships structure is not set in stone and can be modified and rearranged at a whim. Adding or removing any component always takes 1 game turn.
